title: When Will the US Release UFO Documents? FBI Chief Kash Patel Drops Major Hint; Will Area 51 Secrets Be Revealed Too?
description: FBI chief Kash Patel says UFO files will be released soon, claims AI helped stop crime, and addresses burn bag findings amid dismissal rumours. The post When Will the US Release UFO Documents? FBI Chief Kash Patel Drops Major Hint; Will Area 51 Secrets Be Revealed Too? appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

title: Baba Vanga's Prophecy Of Aliens Appearing In 2026 Fuels Conspiracy Theories Ahead Of Trump’s UFO Disclosure

description: Former US Director of National Intelligence James Clapper confirms UAP activity over Area 51, challenging long-standing public narratives and sparking renewed interest in UFO investigations.

title: US Officials Allegedly Warn Pastors in Secret Meeting to Prepare for UFO Files Claiming 'Reptilian Aliens' Could Shake Faith Worldwide
description: American pastors were reportedly briefed on upcoming UFO disclosures that could challenge religious beliefs, potentially causing a crisis of faith. The claims remain unverified and controversial.
